changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.sql: update catissue_specimen s inner join catissue_specimen_hierarchy h on h.descendent_id = s.identifier inner join catissue_specimen p on p.identifier = h.ancestor_id and p.parent_specimen_id is null set s.primary_specimen_id = p.identifier

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.sql: merge into catissue_specimen s using ( select h.descendent_id, h.ancestor_id from catissue_specimen_hierarchy h inner join catissue_specimen p on p.identifier = h.ancestor_id and p.parent_specimen_id is null ) h on (h.descendent_id = s.identifier) when matched then update set s.primary_specimen_id = h.ancestor_id

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.id: Move specimen collection and received details
changeSet.sql: insert into os_spmn_coll_recv_details( primary_specimen_id, collection_container_id, collection_procedure_id, collection_user_id, collection_time, collection_comments, received_quality_id, received_user_id, received_time, received_comments ) select s.identifier, s.collection_container_id, s.collection_procedure_id, s.collection_user_id, s.collection_time, s.collection_comments, s.received_quality_id, s.received_user_id, s.received_time, s.received_comments from catissue_specimen s where s.parent_specimen_id is null and s.lineage = 'New'

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.id: Drop specimen collection and received detail columns

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.sql: drop temporary table if exists os_pos_fmt_pos

create temporary table os_pos_fmt_pos as select p.identifier, ( case when c.pos_labeling_mode = 'LINEAR' and p.pos_one is not null and p.pos_two is not null then case when c.pos_assignment like 'HZ_%' then concat('', ((p.pos_two - 1) * c.no_of_cols) + p.pos_one) else concat('', ((p.pos_two - 1) * c.no_of_rows) + p.pos_one) end when p.pos_two_str is not null and p.pos_one_str is not null then concat(p.pos_two_str, concat(', ', p.pos_one_str)) else null end ) as formatted_position from os_container_positions p inner join os_storage_containers c on c.identifier = p.storage_container_id
update os_container_positions p inner join os_pos_fmt_pos f on f.identifier = p.identifier set p.formatted_position = f.formatted_position

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.sql: merge into os_container_positions p using os_storage_containers c on (c.identifier = p.storage_container_id) when matched then update set p.formatted_position = case when c.pos_labeling_mode = 'LINEAR' and p.pos_one is not null and p.pos_two is not null then case when c.pos_assignment like 'HZ_%' then concat('', ((p.pos_two - 1) * c.no_of_cols) + p.pos_one) else concat('', ((p.pos_two - 1) * c.no_of_rows) + p.pos_one) end when p.pos_two_str is not null and p.pos_one_str is not null then concat(p.pos_two_str, concat(', ', p.pos_one_str)) else null end

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.id: Update specimen position container fields in saved queries
changeSet.sql: update catissue_saved_queries set query_def = replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( query_def, 'Specimen.specimenPosition.containerName', 'Specimen.specimenPosition.container.name' ), 'Specimen.specimenPosition.containerDisplayName', 'Specimen.specimenPosition.container.displayName' ), 'Specimen.specimenPosition.containerBarcode', 'Specimen.specimenPosition.container.barcode' ), 'Specimen.specimenPosition.containerSite', 'Specimen.specimenPosition.container.site' ), 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerName', 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.container.name' ), 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerDisplayName', 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.container.displayName' ), 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerBarcode', 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.container.barcode' ), 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerSite', 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.container.site' ) where query_def like '%Specimen.specimenPosition.containerName%' or query_def like '%Specimen.specimenPosition.containerDisplayName%' or query_def like '%Specimen.specimenPosition.containerBarcode%' or query_def like '%Specimen.specimenPosition.containerSite%' or query_def like '%Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerName%' or query_def like '%Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerDisplayName%' or query_def like '%Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerBarcode%' or query_def like '%Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerSite%'

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.id: Update specimen position and checkout container fields in system workflows

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.id: Update specimen position container fields in CP workflows
changeSet.sql: update os_cp_workflows set workflows = replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( workflows, 'Specimen.specimenPosition.containerName', 'Specimen.specimenPosition.container.name' ), 'Specimen.specimenPosition.containerDisplayName', 'Specimen.specimenPosition.container.displayName' ), 'Specimen.specimenPosition.containerBarcode', 'Specimen.specimenPosition.container.barcode' ), 'Specimen.specimenPosition.containerSite', 'Specimen.specimenPosition.container.site' ), 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerName', 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.container.name' ), 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerDisplayName', 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.container.displayName' ), 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerBarcode', 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.container.barcode' ), 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerSite', 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.container.site' ) where workflows like '%Specimen.specimenPosition.containerName%' or workflows like '%Specimen.specimenPosition.containerDisplayName%' or workflows like '%Specimen.specimenPosition.containerBarcode%' or workflows like '%Specimen.specimenPosition.containerSite%' or workflows like '%Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerName%' or workflows like '%Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerDisplayName%' or workflows like '%Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerBarcode%' or workflows like '%Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerSite%'

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.id: Update specimen position container fields in CP group workflows
changeSet.sql: update os_cp_groups set workflows = replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( replace( workflows, 'Specimen.specimenPosition.containerName', 'Specimen.specimenPosition.container.name' ), 'Specimen.specimenPosition.containerDisplayName', 'Specimen.specimenPosition.container.displayName' ), 'Specimen.specimenPosition.containerBarcode', 'Specimen.specimenPosition.container.barcode' ), 'Specimen.specimenPosition.containerSite', 'Specimen.specimenPosition.container.site' ), 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerName', 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.container.name' ), 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerDisplayName', 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.container.displayName' ), 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerBarcode', 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.container.barcode' ), 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerSite', 'Specimen.checkoutPosition.container.site' ) where workflows is not null and ( workflows like '%Specimen.specimenPosition.containerName%' or workflows like '%Specimen.specimenPosition.containerDisplayName%' or workflows like '%Specimen.specimenPosition.containerBarcode%' or workflows like '%Specimen.specimenPosition.containerSite%' or workflows like '%Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerName%' or workflows like '%Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerDisplayName%' or workflows like '%Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerBarcode%' or workflows like '%Specimen.checkoutPosition.containerSite%' )

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.id: Seed resolved specimen units for query
changeSet.sql: insert into os_query_spmn_units ( cp_id, class_id, type_id, unit_key, quantity_unit_id, conc_unit_id ) select cp.identifier, st.parent_identifier, st.identifier, concat(cp.identifier, concat(':', concat(st.parent_identifier, concat(':', st.identifier)))), coalesce(cp_type.quantity_unit_id, cp_class.quantity_unit_id, sys_type.quantity_unit_id, sys_class.quantity_unit_id), coalesce(cp_type.concentration_unit_id, cp_class.concentration_unit_id, sys_type.concentration_unit_id, sys_class.concentration_unit_id) from catissue_collection_protocol cp inner join catissue_permissible_value st on st.public_id = 'specimen_type' and st.parent_identifier is not null left join os_specimen_type_units cp_type on cp_type.cp_id = cp.identifier and cp_type.specimen_class_id = st.parent_identifier and cp_type.specimen_type_id = st.identifier left join os_specimen_type_units cp_class on cp_class.cp_id = cp.identifier and cp_class.specimen_class_id = st.parent_identifier and cp_class.specimen_type_id is null left join os_specimen_type_units sys_type on sys_type.cp_id is null and sys_type.specimen_class_id = st.parent_identifier and sys_type.specimen_type_id = st.identifier left join os_specimen_type_units sys_class on sys_class.cp_id is null and sys_class.specimen_class_id = st.parent_identifier and sys_class.specimen_type_id is null

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.sql: update catissue_specimen s inner join os_query_spmn_units u on u.cp_id = s.collection_protocol_id and u.class_id = s.specimen_class_id and u.type_id = s.specimen_type_id set s.unit_key = u.unit_key

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.sql: merge into catissue_specimen s using os_query_spmn_units u on ( u.cp_id = s.collection_protocol_id and u.class_id = s.specimen_class_id and u.type_id = s.specimen_type_id ) when matched then update set s.unit_key = u.unit_key

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from catissue_user usr inner join catissue_specimenlist_tags existing_cart on lower(existing_cart.tag_label) = lower( concat( trim(concat(coalesce(usr.first_name, ''), concat(' ', coalesce(usr.last_name, '')))), concat('''s Default Cart (', concat(usr.identifier, ')')) ) )

select count(*) from catissue_specimenlist_tags default_cart inner join catissue_user usr on usr.identifier = default_cart.user_id where default_cart.tag_label = concat('$$$$user_', usr.identifier) and length( concat( trim(concat(coalesce(usr.first_name, ''), concat(' ', coalesce(usr.last_name, '')))), concat('''s Default Cart (', concat(usr.identifier, ')')) ) ) > 255

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.sql: update catissue_specimenlist_tags cart inner join catissue_user usr on usr.identifier = cart.user_id set cart.default_cart = 1, cart.tag_label = concat( trim(concat(coalesce(usr.first_name, ''), concat(' ', coalesce(usr.last_name, '')))), concat('''s Default Cart (', concat(usr.identifier, ')')) ) where cart.tag_label = concat('$$$$user_', cart.user_id)

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.sql: merge into catissue_specimenlist_tags cart using ( select default_cart.identifier, concat( trim(concat(coalesce(usr.first_name, ''), concat(' ', coalesce(usr.last_name, '')))), concat('''s Default Cart (', concat(usr.identifier, ')')) ) as cart_name from catissue_specimenlist_tags default_cart inner join catissue_user usr on usr.identifier = default_cart.user_id where default_cart.tag_label = concat('$$$$user_', default_cart.user_id) ) migrated_cart on (migrated_cart.identifier = cart.identifier) when matched then update set cart.default_cart = 1, cart.tag_label = migrated_cart.cart_name
